creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: danilo
Date: Sat Oct 19 06:06:54 2013
New Revision: 330847
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/330847

Log:
  - Update from 2.19.4 to 3.1.0 [1]
  - Drop .asc file
  - Add stage support
  - Use shebangfix instead of REINPLACE_CMD
  
  PR:		ports/183078
  Submitted by:	Simon Dick <simond@irrelevant.org> (maintainer) [1]

Modified:
  head/x11-fm/worker/Makefile
  head/x11-fm/worker/distinfo
  head/x11-fm/worker/pkg-plist

Modified: head/x11-fm/worker/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/x11-fm/worker/Makefile	Sat Oct 19 05:12:48 2013	(r330846)
+++ head/x11-fm/worker/Makefile	Sat Oct 19 06:06:54 2013	(r330847)
@@ -2,10 +2,9 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	worker
-PORTVERSION=	2.19.4
+PORTVERSION=	3.1.0
 CATEGORIES=	x11-fm
 MASTER_SITES=	http://www.boomerangsworld.de/cms/worker/downloads/
-DISTFILES=	${DISTNAME}${EXTRACT_SUFX} ${DISTNAME}${EXTRACT_SUFX}.asc
 EXTRACT_ONLY=	${DISTNAME}${EXTRACT_SUFX}
 
 MAINTAINER=	simond@irrelevant.org
@@ -16,14 +15,15 @@ RUN_DEPENDS+=	bash:${PORTSDIR}/shells/ba
 GNU_CONFIGURE=	yes
 USE_XORG=	x11
 USE_BZIP2=	yes
+USE_GCC=	4.6+
 
-MANLANG=	"" fr it
-MAN1=		worker.1
+USES=	shebangfix
+SHEBANG_FILES=	${WRKSRC}/scripts/*.sh \
+		${WRKSRC}/scripts/xeditor
 
 CFLAGS+=	${PTHREAD_CFLAGS}
 OPTIONS_DEFINE=	XFT
 
-NO_STAGE=	yes
 .include <bsd.port.options.mk>
 
 .if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MXFT}
@@ -31,17 +31,8 @@ USE_XORG+=	xft
 CONFIGURE_ARGS+=	--enable-xft
 .endif
 
-verify: checksum
-	gpg --verify ${DISTDIR}/${DISTNAME}${EXTRACT_SUFX}.asc
-
 pre-configure:
 	@${REINPLACE_CMD} -e 's|-lpthread|${PTHREAD_LIBS}|g' \
 		${WRKSRC}/configure
 
-post-patch:
-.for f in aa.pattern_rename.sh cd2flac.sh cd2mp3.sh cd2ogg.sh cd2wav.sh xeditor
-	${REINPLACE_CMD} -e 's|/bin/bash|${LOCALBASE}/bin/bash|g' \
-		${WRKSRC}/scripts/${f}
-.endfor
-
 .include <bsd.port.mk>

Modified: head/x11-fm/worker/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/x11-fm/worker/distinfo	Sat Oct 19 05:12:48 2013	(r330846)
+++ head/x11-fm/worker/distinfo	Sat Oct 19 06:06:54 2013	(r330847)
@@ -1,4 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (worker-2.19.4.tar.bz2) = 0f4b4f7d8a7610f1be4181cc01eeb338ba9c368bcd03871a18d1350d12dc182e
-SIZE (worker-2.19.4.tar.bz2) = 1184410
-SHA256 (worker-2.19.4.tar.bz2.asc) = 1dbc73940c1837ec6c1b252224707506bf21b0768a185e11970809a2106cdd10
-SIZE (worker-2.19.4.tar.bz2.asc) = 197
+SHA256 (worker-3.1.0.tar.bz2) = 54e54b4bb98df84e262e7e9b5429748e34de1fcf3f0d9c393310bfb083519c61
+SIZE (worker-3.1.0.tar.bz2) = 1233164

Modified: head/x11-fm/worker/pkg-plist
==============================================================================
--- head/x11-fm/worker/pkg-plist	Sat Oct 19 05:12:48 2013	(r330846)
+++ head/x11-fm/worker/pkg-plist	Sat Oct 19 06:06:54 2013	(r330847)
@@ -1,4 +1,7 @@
 bin/worker
+man/fr/man1/worker.1.gz
+man/it/man1/worker.1.gz
+man/man1/worker.1.gz
 share/pixmaps/WorkerIcon.xpm
 share/pixmaps/WorkerIcon16.xpm
 share/pixmaps/WorkerIcon32.xpm
